Maximize Your Federal Retirement Benefits

Free Workshop — April 9, 2026 | Weber State University Davis Campus
Join fellow Hill AFB federal employees for this exclusive benefits workshop. Learn advanced strategies to maximize your FERS, TSP, and healthcare benefits for a secure, worry-free retirement.
Thursday, April 9, 2026
9:00 AM - 11:00 AM
Weber State University Davis Campus
FREE for Federal Employees

Reserve Your Free Seat

Limited to 50 Hill AFB employees only
1,200+

Google Rating

What You'll Learn

Our comprehensive workshop covers every aspect of federal benefits optimization, giving you the knowledge to maximize your retirement security.

FERS Pension Optimization

Calculate your optimal retirement date and discover advanced strategies to maximize your FERS pension payments throughout retirement.

TSP Maximization

Learn optimal contribution amounts, investment allocation strategies, and withdrawal sequences to get the most from your TSP.

Healthcare & Medicare Planning

Navigate FEHB continuation, Medicare integration, and supplement insurance to ensure comprehensive coverage in retirement.

FEGLI Analysis

Understand your life insurance options and make informed decisions about continuing coverage versus private alternatives.

Social Security Integration

Coordinate Social Security benefits with your federal pension and TSP to maximize total retirement income streams.

Tax Minimization Strategies

Strategic withdrawal sequencing from different account types to minimize taxes and maximize your retirement spending power.

Your Free Personalized Retirement Analysis

Every workshop attendee receives a complimentary, personalized retirement analysis worth $500.

Custom Income Projection

See exactly how your current savings and benefits will translate into monthly retirement income.

Tax Optimization Review

Identify specific strategies to reduce your tax burden and keep more of your hard-earned money.

Benefits Gap Analysis

Discover potential blind spots in your current retirement plan and how to address them.

Mike Stevens will personally review each analysis and provide specific recommendations tailored to your federal benefits and retirement goals.

Mike Stevens

President & Founder, Capital Wealth Advisors
25+ years specializing in federal benefits
Host of Retire Right Radio (#1 in Utah)
Author of Retire Right Retire Now
1200+ federal employees helped
$300M+ managed
Series 66 IAR
"Federal employees have incredible retirement benefits that most financial advisors simply don't understand. My mission is to help every federal employee maximize these benefits and retire with complete confidence."

Federal employees may be eligible to attend this workshop through SF-182 training authorization. Registration is not required to qualify for this educational opportunity.

Don't Miss This Opportunity

This exclusive workshop is designed specifically for Hill AFB federal employees. Seats are limited to ensure personalized attention and maximum value.
